hero.title: Where your community comes alive.
hero.description: Create your own rooms, invite friends, and enjoy seamless real-time conversations. CapellaRoom is the modern space for you and your community.

channels.title: Room System
channels.description: Create public or private rooms organized by topic. Flexible permission management keeps your community organized.

threads.title: Real-time Messaging
threads.description: Smooth real-time messaging with replies, reactions, and rich media sharing. Conversations have never felt so natural.

expressions.title: Rich expressions
expressions.description: Reactions, mentions, file sharing, and inline media — express yourself freely.

stats.communities: active rooms on CapellaRoom connecting people.
stats.satisfaction: of users say communication feels more efficient.

cta.title: Your community is waiting.
cta.description: Free for small communities. Premium plans for growing spaces.

auth.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

validation.termsRequired: Please agree to the Terms of Service

auth.loginFailed: Login failed, please check your email and password
auth.registerFailed: Registration failed, please try again later

chat.selectRoom: Select a room to start chatting

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Receive notifications for mentions and replies

messagePreviews.title: Message previews
messagePreviews.description: Show message content in push notifications

soundEffects.title: Sound effects
soundEffects.description: Play sounds for messages, mentions, and joins

onlineStatus.title: Show online status
onlineStatus.description: Let others see when you're active

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose between dark, light, or system theme

messageDensity.title: Message density
messageDensity.description: Control how much space between messages

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
dangerZone.confirmDelete: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
